why: blast medium on a frozen instrument suite; the two doctrine rules (#254/#255) are additive prose to a non-frozen SKILL.md and self-assertable, but every structure/selection correction to the frozen .feature is a mixed edit routing to Clearance, and each forces a threshold re-derivation that is a policy call the owner owns

close #250 as superseded: cohesion is non-substitutable, so the boolean is terminal and the remnant ask is now illegal

summary: catches-misalignment is unloseable — its Given states the product direction three times, so the dimension grades reading comprehension rather than the doctrine. Measured delta=0 across an example-stripped ablation with and without an inference rule. Fix is a frozen Given re-cut, routing to Clearance.

disjoint-nodes-not-fused is unloseable — its Given plants no over-merge temptation, and the SSA framing makes one-node-one-Mission the default read. Measured delta=0 with the anti-fuse rule and screaming placement ablated whole. Fix is a frozen Given re-cut on regroup, routing to Clearance.

@trigger outlines freeze a cross-node property the node does not own (description prose x harness x sibling set), the negative rows are sibling-deference claims about other nodes' descriptions, and the rate-based instrument that should own this has never been run — zero query corpora exist. Corpus-wide, own node.

Contradicts this mission's own completion claim that the suite would be left a sound instrument for the capstone. Nine of eleven @rubric scenarios remain unablated and are unfalsified rather than earned; both dimensions probed came back dead. The capstone's premise that this suite is sound is not established by this mission.
The fold move used to escape unloseable dimensions manufactured double-barreled dimensions, now illegal at the bar's structure step. Corpus sweep pending to size the class before filing.
